case_title: JOSE ALANIS SANTANA VS. INSURANCEONLINE.COM SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $890.76 FILED BY SANTANA, JOSE ALANIS AS TO DEFENDANT INSURANCEONLINE.COM SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
